title: Gradient Lab
description: A from-scratch perceptual color & gradient studio: interpolate in 7 color spaces (Oklab/Oklch/CIELab…) with per-segment easing, an Oklch gamut-boundary visualizer with CSS Color 4 gamut mapping, ΔE76/94/2000 color difference, animated gradients, mesh gradients, palette harmonies, image extraction, WCAG+APCA contrast, color-blindness preview, and CSS/SVG/PNG/URL export.
